Localization.Description: A user changed the value of the maximum period of calculated totals

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the value of the maximum period of calculated totals to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} changed the value of the maximum period of calculated totals to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
